title: Scillal (disambiguation)
content:
'''Scillal''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
*The '''[[Scillal system]]''', a [[Star system|star system]] in the [[Centrality]]
==Legends==
*The '''[[Scillal system/Legends|Scillal system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]]
*'''[[Scillal Designs]]''', a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturing company headquartered in the Scillal system

{{Disambig}}
